## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing services to Hebbia, a potential client in the AI for finance space.](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content marketing services with AI-powered workflows, focusing on SEO/GEO strategy and high-volume, quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Hebbia faces challenges with their current SEO agency due to lack of finance industry knowledge; GrowthX could potentially replace this agency](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Pricing: $30K for startups (Phase 1), then $15K/month for 5 published articles/week (Phase 2)](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Next steps: Diana to review Town blog content and consider a deeper dive demo if interested](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Service Offering

  - [End-to-end partner for content marketing, powered by AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Services include SEO/GEO strategy, content roadmap creation, daily publishing](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Focus on company website content (blog, guides) and LLM monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Can replace existing SEO agencies with more comprehensive service](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Pricing: $30K Phase 1 (startups), $15K/month Phase 2 (5 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)

### Hebbia's Current Marketing Situation

  - [New marketing function (since July), small team of 3](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Using contractors for Google Ads, agencies for PR and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Struggling with SEO agency due to lack of finance industry knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Recently started trial with Profound (AI content tool)](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Targeting "AI for finance" as key term, finding it challenging to own](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### GrowthX's Capabilities and Examples

  - [Town (accounting): Created entire blog with tax advice content](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Engines (business travel): Developed business travel guides](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Augment (AI coding): 100+ technical guides in 3 months, 2x organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Ramp: Programmatic vendor database, per diem calculator, expense classifier](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Can handle high technical bar and maintain quality at scale](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [AI workflows for brief creation, research, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Human experts (managing director, editor, content manager) involved](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
  - [Customizable to brand voice and technical requirements](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Image creation capabilities based on brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/hAWLtEraosrfn7-kT5ZqQsoxA-yBm1ov?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
